title: Model Adaptation Path
description: Build fluency in Model Adaptation inside Transfer Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AdaLoRA (Adaptive LoRA)
steps.summary: ** AdaLoRA (Adaptive LoRA) belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after LoRA and AdaLoRA.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Adapter Routing
steps.summary: Adapter Routing belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after K-Adapter and Routing Networks. It opens into Multi-Adapter routing and Decoupled Routing Adapter.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning
steps.summary: Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Frozen Layers and Transfer Learning. It opens into Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning Extensions and Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Instruction Fine Tuning and fine-tuning T5.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Instruction Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Instruction Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Fine Tuning and instruction tuning. It opens into Instruction Fine-Tuning (IFT).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Multi-Expert LoRA
steps.summary: Multi-Expert LoRA belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after LoRA and Expert System. It opens into Multi-Expert LoRA-Stack.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Frozen Pretrained Models Techniques
steps.summary: Frozen Pretrained Models Techniques belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Frozen Pretrained Models. It opens into Frozen Pretrained Models Techniques Extensions and Frozen Pretrained Models Techniques Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Frozen Pretrained Models Extensions
steps.summary: Frozen Pretrained Models Extensions belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Frozen Pretrained Models. It opens into Frozen Pretrained Models Techniques Extensions and Frozen Pretrained Models Extensions Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
